content:
# Recommendations for iter-031 (plan agent)

## Lane status: 1.3 DONE
`H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` closed (sorry 4 → 3). The multi-iter functor-`T` lane (023–030) is complete. Three §1 deep theorems now closed: 1.4 (@017), 1.2 (@022), 1.3 (@030). No 1.3 follow-up work remains.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY — author blueprint blocks)
`archon dag-query unmatched` → 2 nodes, both private transport helpers from this iter (no blueprint entry, invisible to the graph):
1. `surjective_of_natIso_map` — `α : F ≅ G` (`Type`-valued functors) ⟹ `Surjective (G.map φ) → Surjective (F.map φ)`. Pure `CategoryTheory` plumbing; deps: `NatTrans.naturality_apply`, `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply/id_apply`, `Iso.hom_inv_id_app`. Suggest `lem:surjective_of_natIso_map`.
2. `hom_postcomp_surjective_of_functorT_zero` — the representability + tilde-FF transport core of `thm:H_free_of_functorT_zero`: from `homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact` to `Surjective (· ≫ sc.g)` for f.p. `N` with `Ñ ≅ H`. Deps: `homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact`, `surjective_of_natIso_map`, `H_represents`, `tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor`. Suggest `lem:hom_postcomp_surjective_of_functorT_zero`, wired into `thm:H_free_of_functorT_zero`'s `\uses`.

## Blueprint signature/phrasing reconciliation (planner prose)
The brick-6 chain was pre-authored @030 and `\lean`-matches, but three blocks have prose↔Lean deltas to reconcile (prover's task_result "Needs blueprint entry"):
- `lem:homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact` — Lean phrases it as **Hom-set surjectivity** `Function.Surjective ((homTensorFunctor f I F).map ((tilde.functor A).map sc.g))`, NOT the abstract "sends ShortExact → ShortExact". Hyps `[IsNoetherianRing A] [IsLocalRing A]`, `hI hF hFqc hs`, `sc hsc`.
- `thm:H_free_of_functorT_zero` — hyps `(A) [Noeth] [Local] (f I F) (ha) (hI : IsSFlat f I) (hs : FiberExtVanishes 1 f I F closedPoint)`; `hF`/`hFqc` derived internally from `ha`. Concl `IsFreeMod (H f I F ha)`.
- `thm:ega_reduce_H_locallyFree` (`External.reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local`) — final sig takes the §1 free-conclusion as an explicit ∀-quantified premise `hfree`; the free-at-point criterion is folded in.

## Cleanup — prune one dead axiom
`External.lfp_free_at_point_locallyFree` (O_I 5.4.1/2.4.1, blueprint `thm:ega_lfp_free_at_point`) was authored but is **NOT consumed** by any Lean decl (its role folded into `reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local`). It is a live axiom with no rdeps. Either delete it (and its blueprint block) or, if kept as a documented EGA boundary marker, note its non-consumption. Low priority but it inflates the External count.

## Blocked targets — do NOT re-assign (no structural change in reach)
- `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2) + `H_tensor` (1.1.3) — PAUSED monoidal lane. No `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`; associator gap needs `MonoidalClosed(PresheafOfModules)`/stalks, both absent v4.30.0. Do not retry the direct presheaf route (refuted iters 007–008).
- `ext_finite_flat` (1.10) — `IsLFPAndFlatOn` is an opaque stub. Per ARCHON_MEMORY: opaque stub ⇒ UNPROVABLE; realize the def first. Needs `R^q f_*` + internal `ℰxt` (overlaps the PAUSED monoidal lane).

**With 1.3 done, the remaining §1 sorries are all gated on the same two absent-Mathlib walls (monoidal structure / relative-Ext + `R^q f_*`).** If the planner wants forward §1 motion, the productive move is to either (a) realize `IsLFPAndFlatOn` / build the relative-Ext + `R^q f_*` strand, or (b) anchor those walls EGA-style (precedent: 1.2/1.4/1.3 anchored their genuine externals). Absent one of these, there is no ready frontier sorry — surface that to the user if no structural step is chosen.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered this iter
- **Nat-iso transports map-surjectivity (`Type`-valued):** `Surjective (G.map φ)` + `α : F ≅ G` ⟹ `Surjective (F.map φ)` via `NatTrans.naturality_apply` + `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply/id_apply`. Avoids the deprecated `FunctorToTypes.naturality` and the removed `coyoneda_obj_map` simp lemma.
- **Right-exactness as Hom-set surjectivity via covariant Ext LES:** `Subsingleton (Ext I X₁ 1)` (connecting map vanishes) + `Abelian.Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₃` lift + `Ext.mk₀_bijective`/`mk₀_comp_mk₀` ⟹ Hom-set surjectivity. Cleaner downstream than an abstract "preserves ShortExact".
- **Free-over-local endgame:** split a kernel SES via post-composition surjectivity on `𝟙 N` → `Module.Projective.iff_split_of_projective` → `Module.Flat.of_projective` → `Module.free_of_flat_of_isLocalRing` (all present in Mathlib — the plan's "possibly absent" flags were false).
- **∀-quantified anchor premise:** when an EGA-reduction anchor takes the §1 output as a universally-quantified `hfree` premise, discharge with explicit `intro` of ALL binders (incl. implicit `X'`/instances) + `@`-application; a plain `fun`-lambda misaligns implicit binders.
- **Forward-reference relocation:** a theorem that must consume machinery defined later in the file can be relocated to EOF with a pointer comment at its original slot (precedent: 1.4, 1.2).
